title: aligera ciliosa
intro: Aligera ciliosa, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The leaves of the Aligera ciliosa plant are known to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of consuming Aligera ciliosa include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of certain cancers, and enhanced immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
